name: linSetGlobalTimeoutPrevention
title: linSetGlobalTimeoutPrevention
description: Activates/deactivates the global timeout prevention for transceivers with a dominant timeout. If active, the cab/piggy will use an inbuilt transistor to keep the bus signal at a dominant level after the dominant timeout stopped the transceiver from transmitting a dominant signal.
return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
